message:
feat: Add missing runtime exports and fix array iteration in for loops

Runtime exports added:
- parseFloatStr, floatIsInteger for float parsing
- pyEqual for generic equality comparison
- floatFloorBig, floatCeilBig, floatAsIntegerRatioBigInt for float operations
- toFloat for type conversion
- pyHash for hash operations
- PyList for list operations

Codegen fix:
- Added array type ([N]T) handling to for loop len/item dispatch
- Previously only handled slices ([]T) and pointers to arrays (*[N]T)
- This fixes iteration over compile-time arrays like VALID_UNDERSCORE_LITERALS

Note: test_float still has issues with operator.mod/pow that need separate fix.
